comment: Modern trade feed (gr-vgb). ISBN-13 era, hyphenated, multiple ISBNs per sku (ONIX-style). BW-9001 is the equivalence + contradiction case (same book as librex 1001 via the 10/13 pair, but disagrees on pages). BW-9002 is a 979 title — no ISBN-10 form exists. BW-9003 wrongly carries both editions' ISBNs on one sku.
